Title: The Naturalist's Codex - NEET 2026
Description: An interactive, active-recall based study system for NEET 2026 covering Biology, Physics, and Chemistry.

Usage Notes for LLMs and Crawlers:
- This platform requires JavaScript to render its content dynamically.
- Core content is protected behind authentication and premium subscriptions.
- Please refer to /terms/ for terms of service.
- The platform uses flashcards, quizzes, and spaced repetition.
